fields.name: title
fields.label: Chart Title
fields.description: Heading above the chart (e.g., NRI ANALYSIS). Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: chartTablet
fields.label: Chart Image (Tablet)
fields.description: Chart image for tablet (601-984px). Optional — falls back to desktop.

fields.name: chartMobile
fields.label: Chart Image (Mobile)
fields.description: Chart image for mobile (<=600px). Optional — falls back to desktop.

fields.name: chartAlt
fields.label: Chart Alt Text
fields.description: Descriptive alt text for screen readers. Describe the data in the chart.

fields.name: footnotes
fields.label: Footnotes
fields.description: p-values, study methodology, AO/OLE disclosures. Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: studyDesignLabel
fields.label: Study Design Link Text
fields.description: Button text shown below footnotes (e.g., VIEW STUDY DESIGN AND BASELINE CHARACTERISTICS). Leave empty to hide the button.

fields.name: studyDesignLink
fields.label: Study Design URL or Modal ID
fields.description: Type # followed by a name you create (e.g., #study-design-1). This opens a Modal block on the same page. The name after # must match the Modal ID field on a Modal block you add to this page. Leave empty if no link is needed.
